title: VEYOFLY Fly Trap Indoor, Fruit Flies Traps for Indoors (2 Device + 6 Refills) Gnat Trap for House Indoor, Fly Catcher, Plug in Light Flying Insect, Bug Light Killer
bullet_points: INDOOR FLY TRAP: Blue-violet light attracts mosquitoes, gnats, fruit flies, house flies, moths, etc., which then get stuck by the adhesive card without escape. The soft blue-violet light effectively attracts flying insects but isn’t strong enough to disturb your sleep. This indoor mosquito trap can also be used as a night light.
Ideal for Indoor Use : Perfect for kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms and offices, this trap eliminates insects without annoying noises, providing a cleaner and more comfortable environment.

FASHIONABLE APPEARANCE: This fruit fly killer is white and black, which looks simple and fashionable, integrating well with your decor. The light is directed toward the wall or ground, so you don't have to worry about the blue-violet light shining directly into your eyes.

6 ADHESIVE CARDS INCLUDED: Replaceable mosquito adhesive cards are included. Flying insects will be firmly stuck by the strong adhesive card, unable to escape. Adhesive cards face the wall, keeping trapped insects well hidden.

24/7 CONTINUOUSLY CATCHING BUGS: With a glue card, the flying insect trap consumes low energy. You can use the indoor gnat killer in various places: bedroom, kitchen, living room, farm, garage, houseplant area, etc.
